hero.heading: Straightforward storage. No gimmicks. No surprise rate hikes.
hero.subheading: Brand-new standard & climate-controlled self storage in Clarence Center and Buffalo. 24/7 gated access, month-to-month leases, and published prices that actually stay published.

proofPoints.heading: Why renters choose Epic Storage
proofPoints.subheading: Three promises that directly answer the questions renters ask us on their first phone call.

cards.title: Brand new in 2026
cards.body: Clean, bright, and climate-controlled from day one. No decades of wear and tear — just a modern facility built with renters in mind.

cards.title: 24/7 gated access
cards.body: Perimeter fencing, dusk-to-dawn exterior lighting, motion-triggered interior lighting, individual unit access, and a gate code that's yours alone — any hour of any day.

cards.title: Pricing you can trust
cards.body: Published rates, no move-in fees, no admin fees, and no surprise price hikes three months in. What you see is what you pay — in writing, in your lease.

pricing.heading: Straightforward pricing
pricing.subheading: Every unit climate-controlled. Month-to-month. No move-in fees. No surprise increases.
pricing.footerNote: Prices shown are for Clarence Center. Pricing at Buffalo Niagara is identical unless otherwise noted. First month 50% off available with a 4-month minimum stay.
pricing.largeSubtitle: When you need the whole garage
